Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Linh Ngo
Message:
feat(tui): selectable field cycling, API key masking, TtsEnabled+SttFallbackPolicy in settings editor

- Add LANGUAGE_PRESETS constant for cycling source/target language fields
- Add TtsEnabled and SttFallbackPolicy variants to ConfigEditorField enum (10 fields total)
- Add tts_enabled and stt_fallback_policy fields to ConfigEditorState
- Add cycle_active_field(), cycle_language_presets(), cycle_choice_field() methods
  that dispatch F2/Ctrl+D to the correct cycling logic per active field
- Add mask_api_key() to mask the Google API key in the settings display
  (shows first 4 + last 4 chars with bullet placeholders in between)
- Update render_config_editor: panel_h=19, new field rows, masked API key,
  updated key hint (F2/Ctrl+D: cycle value)
- Update build_config_from_editor to persist tts_enabled and stt_fallback_policy
- Update ConfigCycleCaptureDevice handler to call cycle_active_field()
  (which dispatches to cycle_capture_device() for the CaptureDevice field)
- Add 27 focused tests covering: cycling all field types, mask_api_key,
  render does not expose full key, build_config_from_editor round-trips

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
